mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_borrow_record where to_days(borrow_date) = to_days(now())
select count(*) from tb_borrow_record where return_date is not null and to_days(return_date) = to_days(now())
select count(*) from tb_borrow_record where status = 'borrowing'
select count(*) from tb_borrow_record where status = 'overdue'
select date(borrow_date) as date, count(*) as count from tb_borrow_record where borrow_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) group by date(borrow_date) order by date(borrow_date) asc

select b.book_id, b.book_name, b.author, b.press, count(br.book_id) as borrow_count from tb_borrow_record br left join tb_book b on br.book_id = b.book_id group by br.book_id, b.book_name, b.author, b.press order by borrow_count desc limit 10

select b.book_id, b.book_name, b.author, b.press, count(br.book_id) as borrow_count from tb_borrow_record br join tb_book b on br.book_id = b.book_id where br.book_id not in ( select distinct book_id from tb_borrow_record where reader_id = #{readerId} ) group by br.book_id, b.book_name, b.author, b.press order by borrow_count desc limit 6
select b.type, count(*) as count from tb_borrow_record br join tb_book b on br.book_id = b.book_id where br.reader_id = #{readerId} group by b.type order by count desc
mapper.sql: select br.borrow_id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.status, br.renew_count, br.fine_amount, br.create_by, br.create_time, br.update_by, br.update_time, br.remark, r.name as reader_name, b.book_name as book_name from tb_borrow_record br left join tb_reader r on br.reader_id = r.reader_id left join tb_book b on br.book_id = b.book_id
mapper.insert: insert into tb_borrow_record( reader_id, book_id, borrow_date, due_date, status, renew_count, fine_amount, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{readerId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, #{renewCount}, #{fineAmount}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
